subject: URGENT: Client demo moved to tomorrow 9 AM
snippet: Hey, the client just moved the demo to tomorrow morning at 9. We need the latest build deployed tonight. Can you handle this?

subject: Interview Scheduling - Final Round
snippet: Congratulations on passing the technical round! We'd like to schedule your final interview. Are you available this Thursday or Friday?

subject: [orby-app] PR #42 merged
snippet: Your pull request 'Add voice command parser' has been merged into main by @teammate.

subject: Your AWS bill for March is $247.89
snippet: Your monthly billing statement is ready. Total charges: $247.89. This is 35% higher than last month.

subject: Performance review next week
snippet: Hi, just a reminder that your performance review is scheduled for next Wednesday at 2 PM. Please prepare your self-assessment.

subject: You have 5 new connection requests
snippet: John Doe and 4 others want to connect with you on LinkedIn.

subject: Bug in production: login flow broken
snippet: Users are reporting 500 errors on the login endpoint since the last deploy. Can you look into this ASAP?

subject: Payment failed for subscription
snippet: We were unable to process the payment for your Pro plan. Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption.

subject: Daily Digest: AI startups raise $2B this week
snippet: Top stories: OpenAI launches new model, Google announces Gemini updates, and more.

subject: Dinner this Sunday?
snippet: Hey! Are you free this Sunday for dinner? Dad wants to grill. Let me know!
